Preload cropped image before displaying to avoid blank flash

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Invalidate gate cache on interpreter change and add ansible_password to add_host

Gate cache (in-memory) was keyed by host name only, so changing a hosts
ansible_python_interpreter mid-run would reuse a stale gate. Add interpreter
field to Gate dataclass and check it on cache retrieval -- close old gate
and create a new one when the interpreter changes.

Add ansible_password as an explicit parameter on add_host() for
password-based SSH auth in container/test environments. Stored in
host vars where the SSH connection code already reads it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement 7 ingest pipeline improvements

1. Person dedup: fuzzy matching with Levenshtein distance prevents duplicate people creation
2. Batch transaction: confirm inserts track created IDs and rollback on failure
3. Source quote accuracy: prompt strengthened + post-processing validates/repairs quotes against original text
4. Extraction confidence: AI returns high/medium/low per item, low-confidence items sorted first in review, badge displayed
5. Ask keyword detection: expanded patterns for escalate, workload, priority, progress, catch-me-up queries
6. Match dismissal tracking: dismissed match suggestions logged to correction_log for feedback loop
7. Parallel OCR: multiple images preprocessed and recognized concurrently with separate workers

security: add ownership verification to all write mutations

- gigs: remove, update, createPackage
- portfolio: update, remove
- experience: updateWorkExperience, removeWorkExperience, updateEducation,
  removeEducation, removeCertification

All mutations now verify the caller owns the resource before patching/deleting.
Uses existing requireAuthUser helper from lib/authHelpers.ts.

fix: saving throw bugs — monster AoE saves, proficiency bonus, drain/multi-target/aoe-debuff save paths, fear aura status

Bug 2: resolveAbilitySave() and all inline save paths now add target.proficiencyBonus + status effect
       save modifiers. Monster save success rate goes from 25.5% to ~50% (expected range).
Bug 3: handleDrain, handleMultiTarget, handleAoeDebuff now have save paths for attackType: 'save'.
Bug 4: 7 fear_aura abilities on L38-L50 monsters now include statusEffect: 'frightened'.
Also: Player AoE (handleAoeDamage) perTargetResults now include save fields for logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Revert FunctionToolCallback Bean registration to resolve circular dependency

## Problem
Circular dependency error occurred when registering FunctionToolCallback as Spring Beans:

bookAgent → bookSearchService → reviewSummarizer → selectedOllamaChatModel
→ toolCallingManager → bookSearchTool → bookSearchFunction → bookSearchService

## Solution
Reverted FunctionToolCallback Bean registration approach and reverted to
creating FunctionToolCallback programmatically within services.

## Changes
- AiConfig: Removed FunctionToolCallback Bean registrations (bookSearchTool, reviewTool, loanCheckTool, etc.)
- AiConfig: Removed ChatClient Bean registrations (libraryAssistantChatClient, orchestrationChatClient)
- AiLibraryAssistantService: Inject ChatModel instead of ChatClient, create FunctionToolCallback programmatically
- AiOrchestrationService: Inject ChatModel instead of ChatClient, create FunctionToolCallback programmatically

## Trade-off
- ❌ Performance optimization lost (creating FunctionToolCallback on every request)
- ✅ Circular dependency resolved
- ✅ All tests passing (129 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors, 6 skipped)

## Test Result
Tests run: 129, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 6
BUILD SUCCESS

rollover logic from workers/auth-worker/src/season-utils.ts and applies

feat: add OSC 52 clipboard support for container-to-host copy

Programs inside the container (e.g. Claude Code's "hit c to copy") can
now write to the host system clipboard. A shell script shim installed as
xclip/xsel/pbcopy emits OSC 52 escape sequences, which the xterm.js
frontend intercepts and forwards to navigator.clipboard.writeText().

commit.message:
Fix Google Trends fetch timeout + add accuracy protocol

- Switch SerpAPI seed calls from sequential to parallel (Promise.all)
  → was 4 calls × ~8s each = 32s (hits Edge 25s timeout)
  → now all 6 calls fire at once, finishes in ~8s max
- Add 10s AbortController timeout per individual SerpAPI call
- Add geo=US and hl=en params for more consistent results
- Fix volume parsing: SerpAPI returns value as string, was always 50
- Strengthen mobile-app relevance filter with NOT_APP exclusions
  and APP_ADJACENT list (tracker, planner, budget, etc. w/o 'app')
- Expand seed topics from 4 to 6 (more app-specific queries)
- Add dataQuality field to response: 'live' | 'mock' | 'degraded'
- Accuracy gate: if live API returns <5 results, mark as degraded
- UI: show ✅ Live / ⚠️ Sample / ⚠️ Degraded badge per source card
- Validate each keyword object (length, volume range, required fields)

commit.message:
feat: run st-validate-local after finalization (#201)

* feat: run st-validate-local after finalization (#198)

st-finalize-repo now runs st-validate-local after switching to the
target branch and pulling latest. This catches validation failures on
develop immediately after a merge, before the next PR is created.

Validation failures return exit code 1 with a warning — the git
finalization (branch switch, pull, prune) still completes. If
st-validate-local is not on PATH, a warning is printed and validation
is skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: make missing st-validate-local a fatal error

If the validation tool is not on PATH, the environment is misconfigured
and finalization should fail loudly rather than silently skip validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: update finalize_repo tests for validation step

Mock shutil.which and subprocess.run in all non-dry-run tests to
account for the new post-finalization validation. Add two new tests:
validation failure returns exit code 1, and missing validator is fatal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: separate lint-only and structural check scopes in markdown-standards

MkDocs/Sphinx pages get markdownlint only (no ToC/H1 checks since the
site provides navigation). README.md gets both markdownlint and
structural checks. Also shorten test mock paths with _MOD constant to
satisfy line-length rules.

Ref #198

commit.message:
fix: correct API paths for products, device-models, and organizations

Frontend was calling /api/v1/admin/products but API Gateway route is
/admin/{proxy+}. The path mismatch caused CORS preflight failures
(403 on OPTIONS → "Failed to fetch"). Affects all product, device-model,
and organization CRUD operations.

Improve plugin quality: native JSON types, configurable retention, softer nudges, single jq pass, handoff chains, priority replay, test suite

- Config values stored as native JSON booleans/numbers (not strings)
- Handoff retention configurable via retention_hours (default: 72h, was hardcoded 24h)
- Context estimation scales with configurable max_transcript_kb (default: 256)
- Nudge messages use informational tone instead of imperative commands
- Transcript extraction consolidated from 5 jq passes to 1 (prefixed output)
- Handoff chains: previous_session field links sessions into a history
- Replay skill: remaining tasks priority-ordered (blockers → in-progress → not-started)
- Test suite: 66 tests covering lib.sh units, hook integration, edge cases

fix: bug hunt — incremental summaries, dead code false positives, caller resolution

- Fix incremental_save missing file_summaries for changed/new files
- Fix find_dead_code falsely flagging preambles and routes as dead
- Fix find_dead_code only checking call refs (now also checks imports)
- Fix get_review_context picking broadest containing symbol instead of tightest
- Fix get_review_context test file matching (min length, basename-only match)
- Fix Rust impl_item name extraction (now extracts implemented type)
- Fix overload disambiguation orphaning child symbols (parent ID fixup)

- Fix detect_changes_git handling renames/copies before extension filter
- Add 60 regression tests across parser, storage, and tools layers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: classify internal/external using normalizarHospital + substring fallback

classificarMovimentacao was using raw toUpperCase().trim() instead of
normalizarHospital(), causing names with "- REDE CASA" suffix or other
variations to miss the UNIDADES_INTERNAS set and be wrongly classified
as external. Now applies the de-para map first and falls back to
substring check for "REDE CASA" / "HOSPITAL CASA".

commit.message:
fix: correct store key matching and subdivision data sources

- Scanning stores: extract numeric prefix from "11788 Мега" for key
  so they correctly match sales store keys ("11788")
- IZ stores: use row.store (col C = numeric code) as map key instead
  of storeLabel() which fell back to row.tc text ("Минск, ТЦ Скала"),
  causing 50006 and similar stores to have no IZ data
- Sales subdivisions: buildSubdivScores() now reads pre-calculated
  subdivision rows (sf.subdivs) from МЕСЯЦ sales files instead of
  averaging individual store scores; SubdivPopover uses pre-computed
  salesAvgRaw from the file, regulation raws from aggregated store data

except the print canvas. Always prints one season regardless of view.
